description: Webapp domain hooks — the pipeline's two invariants enforced deterministically, independent of any model's prompt discipline: the COMMIT GATE (a `git commit` citing (#N) is allowed only when the issue's labels prove qa:pass + review:pass and no blocks — verified against gh at commit time; commits without an issue ref fall to the human) and the PUSH GATE (sub-agents can never push; the main session's push always asks the human — push is the pipeline's one hard human checkpoint before CI deploys).
